source_notes.official_book: NBA official scorer report uploaded by user: 20260505_LALOKC_book (4).pdf
source_notes.recap: AP recap supplied by user: Holmgren 24 points, Thunder top Lakers 108-90 in Game 1.

market_positions.selection: No - Oklahoma City wins by over 13.5 points
Yes - Los Angeles Lakers over 103.5 points

turning_points: OKC trailed 7-0 early but stabilized to lead 31-26 after Q1.
OKC entered halftime up 61-53 despite LAL remaining within striking range.
LAL offensive efficiency collapsed after halftime: 37 second-half points on 37.5% shooting with 10 second-half turnovers.
OKC used 2nd-chance pressure, paint scoring, and bench shot creation to stretch the margin beyond the +13.5 cover zone.

Chet Holmgren.model_relevance: Primary interior + spacing mismatch; OKC offense flowed through Holmgren efficiency and rim pressure.

Shai Gilgeous-Alexander.model_relevance: Below peak scoring but still created enough pressure; turnovers did not prevent OKC margin expansion.

Ajay Mitchell.model_relevance: Key replacement production with Jalen Williams inactive; bench/role-player creation was underestimated.

LeBron James.model_relevance: Kept LAL viable early, but offensive support cratered late.

Austin Reaves.model_relevance: Primary miss driver for LAL team total; usage remained but conversion failed.

Deandre Ayton.model_relevance: Early rebound/paint presence faded; second-half 0 points on 0-6 FG.

pre_halftime_read.edge_quality: Playable but fragile due to OKC shot creation + LAL non-LeBron dependency.

actual_result_delta.second_half_total_delta: LAL scored 37 after needing 51 for TT over 103.5

failure_modes: Lakers half-court creation collapsed without Luka Doncic.
Austin Reaves efficiency failure: 3-16 FG created dead possessions.
OKC second-chance edge: 21-11 for game; 15-9 already visible at halftime.
OKC bench/role-player production remained strong despite Jalen Williams out.
Live spread model over-weighted first-half competitiveness and under-weighted OKC 4Q separation risk.
patch_recommendations: Add NON_LEBRON_CREATION_FAILURE gate for Lakers without Doncic when Reaves is below 30% FG at halftime.
Raise penalty on live team total overs when primary guard is inefficient and offense requires 50+ second-half points.
Apply OKC_MARGIN_EXPANSION_GATE when Thunder hold halftime lead with rebounding edge, 2nd-chance edge, and opponent turnover pressure.
Upgrade role-player replacement module for OKC when Jalen Williams is inactive but Ajay Mitchell/Jared McCain/Isaiah Joe minutes are active.

betting_result_summary.notes: Two LiveFlow positions missed: Lakers +13.5 equivalent and Lakers TT over 103.5. Primary failure was LAL second-half offensive collapse plus OKC margin expansion.
